questionHtml: Bacteria sometimes form biofilms inside metal pipes in water systems. Distinguish between free bacteria and bacteria in biofilms.
markschemeHtml:
a. biofilm bacteria are all together while free bacteria do not interact with others;

b. biofilm bacteria present emergent properties not present in free bacteria;

c. quorum sensing only found in biofilm;

d. EPS matrix only in biofilm;

e. biofilm bacteria are more resistant to antibiotics/disinfectants;

meta.title: Bacteria sometimes form biofilms inside metal pipes in water systems. Distinguish between free bacteria and bacteria in biofilms.
